Back our campaigns

The Liberal Democrats are a campaigning party.

We work hard all year round to get a fair deal for communities.

End the A&E Crisis

End the scandal of 12-hour A&E waits as 2025 sees worst-ever corridor crisis

Join the campaign
View

Keep Britain Moving

Cut fuel duty. Slash rail fares. £1 cap on bus fares.

Sign up
View

No doctors? No Development.

Call to action
View

Halve Your Energy Bill

Back our plan to bring down costs.

Add your name
View

Fix Britain's Trade

Back our plan for a new UK-EU Customs Union

Add your name
View

Keep Children Safe Online

Back our plan for film-style age-rating to ban harmful social media for under 16s.

Add your name
View

Stop Sewage Dumping

Stop sewage from being pumped into our rivers, lakes and seas.

Add your name
View

Save Our Hospices

Back ensure hospices always have the funding and staff to care for anyone who needs their support.

Add your name
View

Make votes fair

Support proportional representation so everyone's voice counts.

Add your name
View

Stop the Family Farm Tax

Sign up
View

Demand Warm Homes

Learn more
View

End Mental Health Injustice

Mental health problems affect one in four of us.

Learn more
View

Burglary Response Guarantee

Guarantee that all burglaries will be attended by police and investigated.

Learn more
View

No to Mandatory Digital ID Cards

GP Guarantee

The Lib Dem plan to guarantee you can see your doctor quickly.

Learn more

Stand up for Carers

Carers do a remarkable and important job.

Learn more
View

Ban Conversion Therapy

Conversion therapy is offensive, abusive and dangerous.

Our campaigning victories

The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy. To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk.

We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy.

Promoted by the Liberal Democrats, First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU.
